category.name: zoo.event.halloween.layer
category.item: Hi! I'm Lucka and I love bats! But especially their cute babies. Bring me as many babies as possible, then I'll have some really nice Halloween items for you. Simply swap sweet ones to get the items on the left or sour ones to get the items on the right.
Inventory
Choose how many %species% babies you want to move to your inventory.
We apologize!
Unfortunately, you don't have enough baby bats in your inventory. Breed baby bats and move them to your inventory to purchase this item.

category.name: zoo.event.halloween.tooltip
category.item: Small bats in inventory
Exchange small bats for sweets
Swap small bats for sour ones
Number: Sweet
Invest %x% sweets to unlock this item
Invest %x% sour to unlock this item
Number: Sour
Help
Move baby bats to inventory

category.name: zoo.event.halloween.comic
category.item:
Welcome to the Halloween event!
From October 25th to November 1st, a spooky party is starting in your zoo! Lots of gifts and surprises are waiting for you. In the next step, you will see how everything will work.
Collect as many sweet and sour as you can! You need the sweet and sour to activate the ghost trailers! You'll find out how it all works on the next page.

If you have enough sweet and sour, you can use them to activate items. But be careful: Sweets will make you look with your eye to the left, sours with your eye to the right. The eye will show you which side the items are activated on.
You can get activated items by exchanging them for baby bats. Raise lots of cute bats. A new button in the enclosure menu will help you save the babies to your inventory quickly and easily.

Have fun in the spooky shop!
For all the impatient: Sweet and sour can be exchanged for baby bats in the shop. More surprises await you in the shop.

Have fun at Halloween this year!

category.name: zoo.event.halloween2012.comicSinglePlayer
category.item:
It's time for some spooky fun!
From October 31st to November 6th, there will be a Halloween party at your zoo!
Collect as many pumpkins as you can! They'll pop out of the enclosures as you take care of your animals.
Add them to the big pumpkin basket for our Pumpkin Battle. The more pumpkins you deliver, the more terrifying rewards you can win.

category.name: zoo.event.halloween2012.comicMultiPlayer
category.item: As you care for your animals, treats will pop out of the enclosures. You can all collect them together. The action bar will fill up and a floating eye will show you which spooky prizes are available for everyone. Click on the reward once it's activated.

category.name: zoo.event.halloween2012.bubble
category.item: Collect pumpkins for the big pumpkin battle. The more you collect, the more prizes you can win.
Everyone plays together! Goodies from all the zoos will fill the meter and automatically unlock prizes for everyone!
